briefdescription.para: Given an uninitialized pairing heap (pheap)

detaileddescription.para: When pheap_init() is called with a pointer to the integer comparison function
Then the heap size is zero, the first node pointer is null and the comparison function is set

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to the uninitialized node (pnode)

detaileddescription.para: When pnode_init() is called with a pointer to the key value
Then the node is initialized with the given value

briefdescription.para: Given a pairing heap (pheap) with a single node (pnode) inserted

detaileddescription.para: When pnode_next() is called
Then a null pointer is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pairing heap (pheap) with nodes inserted (node 1 is a child of node 0)

detaileddescription.para: When pnode_next() is called for the node 0
Then the address of the node 1 is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pairing heap (pheap) with nodes inserted (node 1 has no child and no next node)

detaileddescription.para: When pnode_next() is called for the node 1
Then the address of the parent's next node (null pointer) is returned

briefdescription.para: Given an empty pairing heap (pheap)

detaileddescription.para: When pheap_empty() is called
Then 1 is returned calls pheap_size()

briefdescription.para: Given a non-empty pairing heap (pheap)

detaileddescription.para: When pheap_empty() is called
Then 0 is returned calls pheap_size()

briefdescription.para: Given an empty pairing heap (pheap)

detaileddescription.para: When pheap_size() is called
Then 0 is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pairing heap (pheap) with one node (pnode) inserted

detaileddescription.para: When pheap_size() is called
Then 1 is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pairing heap (pheap) with multiple nodes inserted

detaileddescription.para: When pheap_size() is called
Then the number of nodes is returned

briefdescription.para: Given an empty pairing heap (pheap)

detaileddescription.para: When pheap_insert() is called with a node (pnode) address
Then the node is inserted, heap size is one

briefdescription.para: Given a pairing heap (pheap) with one node (pnode) inserted

detaileddescription.para: When pheap_insert() is called with a node address
Then the node is inserted, heap size is two

briefdescription.para: Given a pairing heap (pheap) with multiple nodes (pnode) inserted

detaileddescription.para: When pheap_insert() is called with a node address
Then the node is inserted, heap size has increased by one

briefdescription.para: Given a pairing heap (pheap) with one node (pnode) inserted

detaileddescription.para: When pheap_remove() is called with the node address
Then the node is removed and the pairing heap is empty

briefdescription.para: Given a pairing heap (pheap) with multiple nodes (pnode) inserted

detaileddescription.para: When pheap_remove() is called with the non-parent node address
Then the node is removed

briefdescription.para: Given a pairing heap (pheap) with multiple nodes (pnode) inserted

detaileddescription.para: When pheap_remove() is called with the parent node address
Then the node is removed

briefdescription.para: Given a pairing heap (pheap) with multiple nodes (pnode) inserted

detaileddescription.para: When pheap_remove() is called with the address of the node which has a child node
Then the node is removed

briefdescription.para: Given a pairing heap (pheap) with multiple nodes (pnode) inserted

detaileddescription.para: When pheap_remove() is called with the address of the node which has both parent and sibling nodes
Then the node is removed

briefdescription.para: Given an empty pairing heap (pheap)

detaileddescription.para: When pheap_find() is called with an address of any key
Then null pointer is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pairing heap (pheap) with multiple nodes (pnode) inserted

detaileddescription.para: When pheap_find() is called with an address of key of one of the inserted Then an address of the node with the key is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pairing heap (pheap) with multiple nodes (pnode) inserted

detaileddescription.para: When pheap_find() is called with an address of a key which is not present in any of the nodes stored in the heap
Then null pointer is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pairing heap (pheap) with one node (pnode) inserted

detaileddescription.para: When pheap_first() is called
Then the node address is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pairing heap (pheap) with multiple nodes (pnode) inserted

detaileddescription.para: When pheap_first() is called
Then the address of the node with a minimum key value is returned

briefdescription.para: Given an empty pairing heap (pheap)

detaileddescription.para: When pnode_foreach() is used with heap's root node
Then body of the loop was not executed

briefdescription.para: Given a pairing heap (pheap) with one node (pnode) inserted

detaileddescription.para: When pnode_foreach() is used with heap's root node
Then body of the loop is executed once

briefdescription.para: Given a pairing heap (pheap) with multiple nodes (pnode) inserted

detaileddescription.para: When pnode_foreach() is used with heap's root node
Then body of the loop is executed once for each node calls pnode_next()

briefdescription.para: Given an empty pairing heap (pheap)

detaileddescription.para: When pheap_foreach() is used
Then body of the loop was not executed calls pheap_first()

briefdescription.para: Given a pairing heap (pheap) with one node (pnode) inserted

detaileddescription.para: When pheap_foreach() is used
Then body of the loop is executed once calls pheap_first()

briefdescription.para: Given a pairing heap (pheap) with multiple nodes (pnode) inserted

detaileddescription.para: When pheap_foreach() is used
Then body of the loop is executed once for each node calls pheap_first() calls pnode_next()

briefdescription.para: Given a pairing heap (pheap) with multiple nodes (pnode) inserted

detaileddescription.para: When pheap_foreach() is used and one of the nodes is removed
Then body of the loop is executed once for each node and the removed node is not present in the heap calls pheap_first() calls pnode_next()

briefdescription.para: Given an empty pairing heap (pheap)

detaileddescription.para: When pheap_contains() is called with a node address
Then 0 is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pairing heap (pheap) with one node (pnode) inserted

detaileddescription.para: When pheap_contains() is called with the node address
Then 1 is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pairing heap (pheap) with one node (pnode) inserted

detaileddescription.para: When pheap_contains() is called with address of the node which is not present in the heap
Then 0 is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pairing heap (pheap) with multiple nodes (pnode) inserted

detaileddescription.para: When pheap_contains() is called with address of the node which is present in the heap
Then 1 is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pairing heap (pheap) with multiple nodes (pnode) inserted

detaileddescription.para: When pheap_contains() is called with address of the node which is not present in the heap
Then 0 is returned

memberdef.argsstring: (const void *const p1, const void *const p2) noexcept
memberdef.name: pheap_cmp_ints

briefdescription.para: This file is part of the CANopen Library Unit Test Suite.

detaileddescription.para:
